1.name: 0486 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
1.rationale: Esr1 is a DEFINING marker of SUPT_0486 (mean_expression=7.72), providing strong molecular overlap with the Esr1-positive classical node. Supertype-level precomputed_expression confirms Kiss1=0.62, Th=2.72, Esr1=7.72 — all three classical markers are detectable at the supertype mean. MBA:272 (AVPV) is present in the anatomy (16/~130 cells, 12%), falling below the 20% threshold — anatomy is partial. PeN (MBA:341) is not listed directly; however MBA:133 (PVpo), which is adjacent periventricular territory, accounts for 64 cells. No classical negative markers conflict with this supertype's defining markers (Apoc3, Insm2, Prok2, Esr1, Bmp3, Rarb, Lhx5, Slc18a2 — none are negative markers for avpv_kiss1_neuron). GABA nt_type is consistent with the classical GABAergic/dopaminergic identity. The DB score (3) is suppressed because Kiss1 and Th are not among the supertype-level defining_markers metadata columns — they appear only in precomputed_expression. Child-cluster analysis reveals that CLUS_1915 co-expresses all three classical markers at highest levels and is strongly female-biased.
1.neuropeptide_assessment: Kiss1 present at supertype mean (0.62); CLUS_1915 shows highest Kiss1 expression (2.51) among children. No conflicting neuropeptides detected.
1.location_quality: PARTIAL — MBA:272 (AVPV) present (16 cells, 12% of ~130 total), below 20% threshold. MBA:133 (PVpo, 64 cells) and MBA:515 (MPN, 37 cells) dominate. PeN (MBA:341) not listed. AVPV cells are concentrated in CLUS_1912 (n=8 per task notes) and MBA:1097 Hypothalamus catchall region.
1.sex_ratio: NOT_PROVIDED at supertype level; child cluster CLUS_1915 MFR=0.02 (strongly female-biased), CLUS_1916 MFR=0.08 (female-biased). Most other children are sex-neutral or male-enriched.

best_child_cluster.label: 1915 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5
best_child_cluster.rationale: CLUS_1915 is the only child cluster with appreciable Kiss1 (2.51) AND high Th (6.6) — precisely the Kiss1+TH co-expression signature that defines the classical AVPV/PeN kisspeptin neuron. Esr1=9.55 (highest among children). MFR=0.02 is the most strongly female-biased cluster in the supertype, matching the FEMALE_BIASED sex_bias of the classical node. Despite the small n=3 cell count and MBA:1097 (Hypothalamus) catchall annotation, the molecular and sex-ratio profile is highly consistent. NOTE: CLUS_1915 was NOT in the top-30 DB rank-0 results because its defining_markers metadata columns do not include Kiss1/Th/Esr1 — these appear only in precomputed_expression. It was identified through manual child_cluster_expression inspection of SUPT_0486.
best_child_cluster.caveats: Very small cell count (n=3). Primary soma listed as MBA:1097 (Hypothalamus, a broad catchall) rather than MBA:272 directly — spatial resolution at cluster level may be insufficient to resolve AVPV vs adjacent PVpo/PeN.

CLUS_1912.note: No Kiss1; Th moderate; Esr1 low; sex-neutral. Likely AVPV TH+ but not Kiss1+.

CLUS_1913.note: Low Kiss1; Th moderate; Esr1 high; strongly MALE-biased (MFR=10.11). Does not match FEMALE_BIASED classical node.

CLUS_1914.note: No Kiss1; low Th; Esr1 high; strongly MALE-biased (MFR=10.11). Does not match.

CLUS_1915.note: BEST CHILD: highest Kiss1, highest Th, highest Esr1, most female-biased. Recommended cluster-level mapping target.

CLUS_1916.note: Very low Kiss1; low Th; high Esr1; female-biased (MFR=0.08). Possible Esr1+ but not Kiss1+TH+ phenotype.

1.name: 0482 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_1
1.rationale: Same parent subclass as SUPT_0486 (SUBC_106, PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba) and has MBA:272 (AVPV) anatomy (166 cells — much higher count than SUPT_0486). However, defining markers are Csta2, Isl1, Nts, Zic1 — none of which match the classical Kiss1/Th/Esr1 signature. No precomputed_expression data retrieved for this supertype in this session; the defining marker mismatch alone is sufficient to deprioritise. The DB score of 4 likely reflects anatomical match and generic GABA nt_type match. Nts (neurotensin) co-expression is not a feature of the classical avpv_kiss1_neuron profile.
1.negative_marker_conflicts: NONE (no classical negative markers defined), but defining markers Csta2/Isl1/Nts/Zic1 are orthogonal to the Kiss1/Th/Esr1 signature
1.neuropeptide_assessment: Nts (neurotensin) is a defining marker — not a feature of the classical node. No Kiss1 in defining markers.
1.location_quality: MBA:272 present (166 cells) — strong AVPV overlap. However this is likely the AVPV TH/neurotensin population, not the kisspeptin population.

1.name: 0418 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_8
1.rationale: PVR (periventricular region) lineage, not PVpo-VMPO-MPN. Defining markers include Hmx2 and Pmaip1/Glp1r — no Kiss1, Th, or Esr1. Precomputed expression shows Kiss1=0.0, Th=0.2, Esr1=0.61 — all near-zero. MBA:272 is present (11 cells) but the molecular signature is entirely inconsistent with the classical node. The DB score=4 likely reflects anatomical proximity and Six3/Sox3 transcription factor lineage match. The PVR lineage in this taxonomy encompasses circumventricular organs and related ependymal-adjacent regions — a biologically distinct population from AVPV kisspeptin neurons.
1.negative_marker_conflicts: NONE formally, but near-zero Kiss1/Th/Esr1 expression is functionally exclusionary
1.neuropeptide_assessment: No neuropeptide markers consistent with Kiss1 neuropeptide phenotype
1.location_quality: MBA:272 present but minor (11 cells). Primary locations are Median preoptic nucleus (MBA:452), choroid plexus (MBA:108), Subfornical organ (MBA:338) — circumventricular rather than AVPV.

1.name: 0417 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_7
1.rationale: Same PVR Six3 Sox3 lineage as SUPT_0418. Circumventricular/ependymal-adjacent population, not AVPV kisspeptin. Molecular signature inconsistent with Kiss1/Th/Esr1 classical markers.
1.location_quality: MBA:272 status not confirmed in this session; PVR lineage primarily in circumventricular organs

1.name: 0415 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_5
1.rationale: Same PVR Six3 Sox3 lineage. Circumventricular population; molecular signature inconsistent with classical node.
1.location_quality: PVR lineage primarily in circumventricular organs, not AVPV

1.name: 0411 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_1
1.rationale: Same PVR Six3 Sox3 lineage. Circumventricular population; molecular signature inconsistent with classical node.
1.location_quality: PVR lineage primarily in circumventricular organs, not AVPV

0.name: 1301 MEA-BST Lhx6 Nfib Gaba_4
0.rationale: DB rank 1 due to female-biased MFR=0.1 boosting score. However this cluster is in the MEA-BST (medial amygdala / bed nuclei of stria terminalis) lineage — wrong anatomical region entirely. Parent supertype SUPT_0360 maps to BST (MBA:351), MPN (MBA:515), DMH (MBA:830), and Posterodorsal preoptic nucleus — none of which are AVPV (MBA:272) or PeN (MBA:341). The sex_bias female boost inflated the score but the anatomical and molecular lineage is inconsistent with AVPV kisspeptin neurons. Defining markers Gldn/St18/Npas1/Lhx6 are MEA-BST markers, not AVPV markers.
0.sex_bias_note: Female-biased but anatomically MEA-BST, not AVPV/PeN — sex bias alone insufficient to support candidacy
0.location_quality: WRONG REGION — MEA-BST lineage; no AVPV or PeN anatomy

0.name: 1891 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_2
0.rationale: Same parent subclass (SUBC_106) as SUPT_0486 — correct regional lineage. MFR=0.1 (female-biased). Parent supertype SUPT_0483 defining markers are Csta2/Nts/Vxn/Dlx1. No Kiss1 or Th in parent defining markers. SUPT_0483 anatomy is dominated by MBA:515 (MPN, 557 cells), MBA:523 (MPO, 257 cells), MBA:1097 (Hypothalamus, 189 cells), MBA:576073699 (VMPO, 159 cells), MBA:133 (PVpo, 109 cells), MBA:351 (BST, 125 cells) — no MBA:272 (AVPV) in parent supertype. The Nts-defining signature suggests neurotensin interneurons, not kisspeptin neurons. Female bias is a positive but the molecular and fine anatomical match is weak.
0.location_quality: PVpo-VMPO-MPN lineage is correct regional context, but parent supertype lacks MBA:272; likely primarily MPN/VMPO

0.name: 1895 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_2
0.rationale: Same parent supertype as CLUS_1891. MFR=0.06 — most strongly female-biased among the SUPT_0483 children. Correct regional lineage (SUBC_106). However same molecular lineage concerns as CLUS_1891: no Kiss1/Th in parent defining markers, Nts-based signature. The extreme female bias (MFR=0.06) is noteworthy but insufficient without molecular evidence for Kiss1/TH co-expression.
0.location_quality: PVpo-VMPO-MPN lineage correct but parent supertype lacks AVPV anatomy

0.name: 1876 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_1
0.rationale: Parent supertype SUPT_0482 has strong AVPV anatomy (166 cells MBA:272) but defining markers Csta2/Isl1/Nts/Zic1 are inconsistent with Kiss1/TH phenotype. MFR=1.17 (sex-neutral). Despite correct regional lineage, neither sex bias nor molecular signature supports AVPV kisspeptin identity.
0.location_quality: Parent has MBA:272 (AVPV) but likely Isl1/Nts-positive neurotensin population

0.name: 1531 PVR Six3 Sox3 Gaba_9
0.rationale: PVR Six3 Sox3 lineage (circumventricular/ependymal-adjacent). MFR=1.13 (sex-neutral). No molecular match to Kiss1/Th/Esr1 classical signature. Wrong lineage.

recommended_mapping_target.confidence: PLAUSIBLE — pending annotation transfer and full expression validation
recommended_mapping_target.rationale_summary: SUPT_0486 (0486 PVpo-VMPO-MPN Hmx2 Gaba_5) is the primary rank-1 candidate. Esr1 is a defining marker; supertype-level precomputed_expression confirms all three classical markers (Kiss1=0.62, Th=2.72, Esr1=7.72). MBA:272 (AVPV) is present in the anatomy (16 cells, 12%) — partial but the correct region. No classical negative marker conflicts. Child-cluster CLUS_1915 co-expresses Kiss1 (2.51), Th (6.6), and Esr1 (9.55) at the highest levels among all five children and has the most strongly female-biased sex ratio (MFR=0.02), directly matching the FEMALE_BIASED classical node. CLUS_1915 was not in the top-30 DB rank-0 results because its Kiss1/Th/Esr1 profile appears only in precomputed_expression, not in the defining_markers metadata columns used by the scoring function.

non_candidates_summary: The four PVR Six3 Sox3 supertypes (SUPT_0411/0415/0417/0418, db_score=4) are circumventricular/ependymal-adjacent populations with near-zero Kiss1/Th/Esr1 expression — wrong lineage despite proximity to AVPV in some cases. CLUS_1301 (MEA-BST, score=6 rank-0) is the highest-scoring rank-0 candidate but is anatomically in the amygdala/BST lineage; its high score is an artefact of the sex_bias=female boost applied to its MFR=0.1. MEA-BST populations are biologically unrelated to AVPV kisspeptin neurons. SUPT_0482/CLUS_1876 are in the correct SUBC_106 lineage and have strong MBA:272 anatomy, but define the AVPV Isl1/Nts/neurotensin population rather than the kisspeptin population — likely the avpv_th_neuron or a separate neurotensin subpopulation. The DTN-LDT-IPN, STR, Vip, Sst, LSX, CEA-AAA-BST, and MEA-BST supertypes (rank-1 scores 2-3) are in brainstem, striatum, or amygdala lineages with no AVPV anatomy — excluded.
db_scoring_limitation_note: The rank-0 DB scoring was driven by sex_bias=female boosting (CLUS_1301 ranked first despite wrong anatomy) and failed to surface CLUS_1915 because its Kiss1/Th/Esr1 values are in precomputed_expression only, not in defining_markers metadata columns. Manual child_cluster_expression inspection of SUPT_0486 was essential to identify CLUS_1915 as the best biological match.
